name: Nantou County (Taiwan)
description: A yellow field charged at the centre with the Nantou County emblem.
history: Nantou County (Nantou Xian) is the only landlocked county in Taiwan, occupying the central interior and including Sun Moon Lake and a large section of the Central Mountain Range. The current county flag uses an elaborate multicolour emblem evoking the county's mountain, lake and agricultural landscape.

features.symbolism: abstract composition of mountain, lake, sun and flowers, representing the Central Mountain Range, Sun Moon Lake, and the highland agriculture of Taiwan's only landlocked county
